what: Recursively delete the vault's local directory from the filesystem
why: For local vaults, the files were created by Nori and should be cleaned up. For git vaults, the git repo is user-owned and must not be touched.

success_handling.criteria: vault_type === 'local' and fs.rm succeeds, or vault_type !== 'local' (skipped)

decisions.rationale: Git vault repos are user-owned — Nori must not delete them. Local vaults were created by Nori and should be cleaned up.
